rulings.Case Title: 421-435 BUENA VISTA AVENUE EAST ASSOCIATION VS. DARIN C. MORGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Fixing Post Judgment Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 14, 2018, line 1. PETITIONER 421-435 BUENA VISTA AVENUE EAST ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion For Order Fixing Post Judgment Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED in the amount of $12,855 pursuant to CCP 685.040 and 1033.5(a)(10)(A). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 14, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. There is a triable issue of material fact as to whether Plaintiff's application for a loan modification was complete prior to Defendant's initiation of foreclosure proceedings. Defendant's Alternative Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Defendant failed to comply with California Rules of Court, rule 3.1350 subdivision (b); the issues specifically stated in the Notice of Motion are not repeated verbatim in the Separate Statement of Undisputed Material Facts. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHEILA HARRIS-YOUNG ET AL VS. AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION INC., ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: American Realty & Construction Inc., Helen Chan, Nikki Szeto, Patrick Szeto, And Richard Szeto'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And Stay Of Underlying Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 14, 2018, line 4. American Realty & Construction Inc., Helen Chan, Nikki Szeto, Patrick Szeto, And Richard Szeto'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And Stay Of Underlying Action DENIED. Although the arbitration clause is valid, Defendants waived their right to compel arbitration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERBERT GLENN BEASLEY VS. SEAN W. YORE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 14, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT SEAN YORE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DENIED. Defendant failed to demonstrate how allegations in the complaint were either irrelevant, false, or improper within the meaning of CCP § 436. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERBERT GLENN BEASLEY VS. SEAN W. YORE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 14, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT SEAN YORE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULLED in its entirety. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support each cause of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SUSIE WIGGINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 14, 2018, Line 8. DEFENDANT SUSIE WIGGINS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. (1) Defendant failed to shift burden by not citing authority in her Demurrer; regardless, (2) Plaintiff served Defendant a 10 Notice to Quit which provided sufficient information to enable Defendant to prepare a defense. =(501/REQ)
